title: ourisia crosbyi
intro: Ourisia crosbyi, also known as the New Zealand forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Ourisia crosbyi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
